name: Elliot (Non-Forsaken)
description:
Are you a virgin? I'll fix it.

Your friend added an aphrodisiac to the pizza he brought you. Find out where it leads!

to be honest, this character triggered me. So innocent, so kind....He reminds me of my former friend. He was kind and innocent too. Ah, I wish I could meet him again :( Although he said I was a terrible person. Bruh

I'm thinking of making an angel or some kind of non-consensual both with Guest 1337 cause she's so CUTE.

I want to make an Announcement like a cool author, but no one likes my bots crying
creator: Naomilave
